sections.title: Christianity As The Unique Convergence Point
sections.text: ## The Strengthened Derivation - FOR and AGAINST

sections.title: David Lowe | POF 2828 | May 18, 2026
sections.text:
## What This Document Is
This document presents the derivation chain at full strength, then preserves the strongest objections at full strength. The goal is not to rig the outcome, but to test whether honest first-principles reasoning converges. The current pass is mainly the Old Testament diagnostic layer: the problem set that the New Testament solution must answer.

sections.title: Phase 0 - Truth Before Error
sections.text:
You cannot have a lie without something true to distort. You cannot have death without life to lose. You cannot have corruption without something good enough to corrupt. Evil is not equal-and-opposite to good; evil is parasitic on prior good.
Metaphysically, negation is derivative. Distortion requires a prior undistorted state. A world cannot be grounded in what is derivative, because the derivative requires something prior to derive from. Therefore truth, life, order, coherence, and goodness have ontological priority over lie, death, disorder, corruption, and evil.
Scientifically, coherent worlds require stable laws, error bounds, signal preservation, and correction mechanisms. DNA proofreading, immune response, homeostasis, conservation laws, and channel capacity limits are the architecture that lets coherent observers exist. If error were unbounded, coherence would collapse before galaxies, life, memory, reason, or moral agency could persist.
Lean attachment: Coherence algebra and product-collapse theorem. If any factor in the coherence product goes to zero, the whole collapses. Error-bounded systems require nonzero coherence at every level.

sections.title: Phase 1 - Historical Ground
sections.text: Apply strict criteria to resurrection claims: named historical individual, public death, burial, multiple independent witness traditions, hostile verification environment, and bodily resurrection claim. Not visions, myths, resuscitations, or near-death experiences. The conjunction appears uniquely in Jesus of Nazareth. This does not prove the resurrection, but removes the "one myth among thousands" dismissal and establishes that the claim deserves unique analysis.

sections.title: Phase 2 - What Makes A God A God
sections.text: Everything contingent eventually dies. The categorically different property would be authority over death itself. Not avoidance, not delay, but victory. Genuine death-defeat requires entry into death's domain, real subjection, actual death, and irreversible reversal.

sections.title: Phase 3 - The Board Of Directors
sections.text:
Imagine a board evaluating candidates for Godhood over a new world. The test is not accumulated power. The test is trustworthiness with creation: living inside the system under the same constraints as everyone else, doing what no one else can do, and overcoming the system's final boundary.
If we design God from scratch, ultimate divinity would be good, loving, just, merciful, wise, patient, creative, truthful, and self-sacrificial. Humans recognize goodness as more ultimate than power. That intuition needs explanation.

sections.title: Phase 4 - Creation And Free Will
sections.text: Creation points toward relationship. Compelled love is not love, so a good God creates beings who can freely respond. Free response makes rejection possible. Given real free will and time, deviation is structurally inevitable. The test reveals the human condition.

sections.title: Phase 5 - Justice And Mercy
sections.text:
Pure justice alone condemns everyone. Creation is emptied. Pure mercy alone lets everyone enter unchanged. The destination is corrupted again. The solution must preserve justice, preserve mercy, and transform beings simultaneously. Drop any one constraint and the system breaks.
Justice and mercy are not enemies. They are one restoration operator with a different cost-bearer. Justice names the debt. Mercy changes who bears it. Mercy does not delete the cost; it moves the cost. Someone always pays.
Lean attachment: Three-constraint optimization and sign invariance. Self-operations preserve sign; a corrupted system cannot flip its own orientation. External intervention, the grace operator, is mathematically required.

sections.title: Phase 6 - Resume Versus Posture
sections.text: Person A has the moral resume but trusts himself. Person B is broken but keeps turning back. God can work with Person B because transformation requires openness. A closed system resists input. The dividing line is pride versus surrender.

sections.title: Phase 7 - Righteousness And Blood
sections.text:
Absolute righteousness does not grade on a curve. Before perfect holiness, every sin is categorically disqualifying. Under forgiveness, sin is completely removed. Within creaturely history, sins can still differ in consequence, knowledge, and responsibility.
Scripture anchors include James 2:10, Romans 3:23, Romans 6:23, Isaiah 59:2, Psalm 103:12, Isaiah 43:25, Hebrews 8:12, 1 John 1:9, John 19:11, and Luke 12:47-48.
If a righteous God cannot ignore wrong but will not destroy every wrongdoer, something must stand between them: covering, payment, mediator. Blood functions as life-cost. Animal sacrifice is temporary because the currency does not match the debt. The permanent payment must be human, divine, voluntary, and sufficient across time.

sections.title: Phase 8 - Obedience
sections.text: A child may not understand a parent's command at 2AM when danger is real and the frame gap is too great. Honest obedience is not fake enthusiasm; it is reluctant trust. Gethsemane is the pure form.

sections.title: Phase 9 - Old Testament Triage
sections.text:
Before the permanent solution, there is no internal protection layer, no distributed Spirit, and no immune function. Corruption spreads without antibodies. The Old Testament is battlefield medicine before antibiotics: containment before cure, transformation after. Same God, different operating conditions.
The Old Testament problem set includes: law diagnoses but does not cure; sacrifice covers but does not complete; blood functions as life-cost; judgment contains corruption before cure; Israel cycles because external rescue without internal transformation is unstable; death remains the terminal boundary.

sections.title: Phase 10 - The Solution
sections.text:
Teaching shows the standard, but information is not transformation. Nature is the problem. A mediator must die because the fracture terminates at death. A mediator who never enters death never fully enters the fracture. The cross is the mechanism; the resurrection is the proof. If death cannot permanently contain the mediator, the system's final weapon has failed.
Lean attachment: MasterEquation product-collapse structure. If any factor were zero, chi would collapse. If coherence is nonzero after the death event, the boundary condition has been breached.

sections.title: Phase 11 - The Match
sections.text: The full conjunction - death-defeating, good, self-sacrificial, justice-and-mercy resolving, incarnate, blood-payment, transformative, resurrection-centered - maps uniquely to Jesus of Nazareth. Q1 established Jesus reaches the table. The derived profile then returns to the historical claim and finds the same candidate.

sections.title: Phase 12 - Final Fork
sections.text: This does not coercively prove Christianity. It shifts the burden. It moves the resurrection claim from impossible nonsense to a coherent explanatory center of the combined data. Logic gets to the door; trust walks through it. Faith is not anti-reason; it is reason handing off to trust when the trusted source sees more than the local frame.

sections.title: Argument Against
sections.text:
The questions are directional. This is the strongest structural objection. The chain is designed to narrow toward Christianity. The defense is not neutrality but earned derivation: each lock must survive pushback without hidden Christian premises.
AI blind tests show construction and internal coherence, not empirical truth. They test the argument's structure, not the premises.
Other solutions may satisfy some constraints. The chain should claim practical uniqueness unless a true mathematical uniqueness proof has been supplied.
Truth-before-error does not automatically entail a personal God. It may point to an impersonal substrate, mathematical structure, or brute fact. The personal move requires additional argument.
Evil-as-parasitic is disputed. The narrower claim is harder to reject: truth can exist without falsehood, but falsehood cannot exist without truth.
The resurrection remains historically debated. The metaphysical chain makes the history matter more; it does not replace historical investigation.
Multiple convergence is not proof unless the domains are genuinely independent. Pattern-matching and confirmation bias remain real risks.

sections.title: Equation As Narrative
sections.text:
Read the dynamic reduction as narrative:
```text
dC/dt = O * G * (1 - C) - S * C
```
Creation: C starts at 1; all ten variables are positive. The product is nonzero.
Fall: S activates; the negative S*C term pulls coherence down. Sin degrades what was already good. Corruption is parasitic on prior order.
Impossibility: sign invariance means the system cannot flip its own sign. The term O*G*(1-C) requires G from outside.
Law period: G is available but O is low, so O*G is small. The S*C term dominates. This predicts Old Testament containment and slow decline punctuated by intervention.
Cross: G spikes as massive external information injection. The grace operator is non-unitary, idempotent, and requires voluntary coupling.
Resurrection: C survives the death boundary. If any required factor were zero, chi would be zero. Death fails to hold.
Sanctification: O*G*(1-C) dominates S*C. The further a person is from full coherence, the larger the restoration gradient.
Eschaton: C approaches 1. Full coherence is restored.
The ten variables are the cast. Grace creates the field. Truth illuminates. Love binds. Logos carries meaning. Faith observes and collapses possibility into reality. Moral conservation ensures nothing is lost. Christ/coherence integrates the whole. The Master Equation is one story told in ten frequencies.

sections.title: Lean 4 Attachment Points
sections.text:
Phase 0: CoherenceAlgebra formalizes product collapse.
Universal failure: MasterEquation formalizes ten-factor collapse.
Three constraints: AxiomChain should formalize simultaneous satisfaction.
Self-repair impossible: SignInvariance should formalize self-generated operators preserving sign.
Grace from outside: GraceOperator formalizes non-unitary, idempotent, externally sourced repair.
Permanent payment: MoralConservation should formalize the atonement tensor and three-body conservation.
Resurrection as proof: TenLawIsomorphism should formalize death-defeat across law pairs.
Full chain: CanonicalLagrangian should formalize the claim that the LLC generates all ten laws as dimensional reductions.

equations: dC/dt = O * G * (1 - C) - S * C
